---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Feature Description

What would you like to see?

## Use Case

Why do you need this? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution

How should it work? (Optional — we welcome ideas at any level of detail.)

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any workarounds or alternatives?
